@mheon @rhatdan @TomSweeneyRedHat 

I can't seem to get the PR checks to work ... seems to be caught up in validating the DCO however I believe the DCO is there on the commit message? 

https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/9899/commits/d3c0e0d02e325362221310b4f4dff47df03034de

Any suggestions, thanks!
You need a line break between your title and your signature.  This is also going to need tests or the [NO TESTS NEEDED] flag.

Could you rebase your PR

git pull origin master
git rebase -i origin
git push --force

@rhatdan Thanks for the help, I appreciate it! I'm not sure what to do about the failing task though it doesn't appear to be related to the code change since there are no --network flags being tested.
Restarted the ubuntu-2004 root test, it looked like a time out/flake trying to stop a container.
